patch.value: CI gap: plugin/package markdown pushed to main runs no functional workflow

ci.yml:7-12 push paths-ignore includes '**/*.md' (plus redundant CHANGELOG.md/CONTRIBUTING.md entries already covered by the glob), while docs.yml:4-23 push/PR paths cover only docs/**, .agents/skills/**, root *.md, CHANGELOG/CONTRIBUTING, ISSUE_TEMPLATE. plugins/**/*.md (slash commands, skills, subagent prompts — functional plugin assets validated by scripts/smoke-claude-plugin.mjs) and packages/**/README.md are ignored by CI on push AND not matched by Docs, so a direct push to main touching only plugin markdown runs no gate except CodeQL. PRs are unaffected (ci.yml pull_request has no paths filter). Fix options: add 'plugins/**' (or '!plugins/**/*.md' style carve-out) to ci.yml paths-ignore exceptions, or extend docs.yml paths with plugins/** and packages/**/*.md so the docs-skills gate + smoke runs. Severity low (workflow discipline is PR-based) but it is the one push-path hole; everything else in .github/workflows is healthy: all actions SHA-pinned, least-privilege permissions blocks, concurrency groups, pnpm+tsbuildinfo+lancedb caches, release.yml Sentry reliability gate intact (:113-121) with auto-release pre-flight token guard (auto-release.yml:114-118), last 15 runs green incl today's Auto Release -> Release chain.

value.note: re-include plugin markdown in functional CI push path
cover markdown docs paths consistently in docs workflow

patch.value: Updated workflow path filters so plugin markdown re-enters functional CI and locked the contract test; docs gates, workflow test, and coverage passed.
Changed workflow path filters so plugin markdown changes on main run functional CI while docs markdown still routes through docs workflow.
Plugin markdown edits are not skipped by all functional validation on push.
CI workflow now uses paths with plugins/** re-inclusion; workflow contract, docs gates, and coverage passed.
